title: rosa canina var. occulta
intro: Rosa canina var. occulta, also known as the hidden or wild rose, is a variety of the Rosa canina species, a type of wild rose native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its hips, which are rich in vitamins A and C, potassium, and other essential nutrients, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. occulta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat conditions like colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
